summary: Backend testing completed for email notification features on Swap/Send/Withdraw actions. All 11 tests passed. Email notifications are triggered correctly with transaction details and status badges (Processing/Completed). Italian translation works in emails. All three endpoints function correctly without regressions.

minor.issue: Rate limiting occurs when sending multiple emails rapidly (Resend API limit: 2 requests/sec). This is expected behavior from the email provider, not a bug.

POST /api/wallet/swap - Email Trigger.details: Swap returns success and triggers email with status='completed' (swaps are instant). Email subject: 'Transaction Notification - Swap X USDC → EUR'

POST /api/wallet/send - Email Trigger.details: Send returns success with 'processing' status and triggers email with status='processing'. Auto-completes after 2 minutes with second 'completed' email.

POST /api/wallet/withdraw - Email Trigge.details: Withdraw returns success with 'processing' status and triggers email with status='processing'. Auto-completes after 2 minutes with second 'completed' email.

Auto-complete Function Sends Completion.details: _complete_transaction_after_delay uses find_one_and_update to get transaction data and sends completion email with status='completed' after 2-minute delay

Email Template Status Badge (Processing/.details: Email template shows colored status badge: Processing (yellow #f9a825), Completed (green #4caf50). Badge HTML: Status

Italian Translation in Emails.details: Italian emails work correctly. Subject: 'Notifica Transazione - Scambio X USDC → EUR'. Status labels: 'In Elaborazione' (Processing), 'Completato' (Completed)

Endpoint Regression Tests.details: All three endpoints (swap/send/withdraw) return expected data structure. Frozen accounts correctly blocked with 403 status.

sample_logs: Sending email to test_email_51c27e10@test.com: Transaction Notification - Swap 100.00 USDC → EUR

Sending email to test_email_51c27e10@test.com: Notifica Transazione - Scambio 25.00 USDC → EUR (Italian)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Email notification testing complete. All Swap/Send/Withdraw actions trigger emails correctly. Swap emails show 'completed' status (instant). Send/Withdraw emails show 'processing' initially, then 'completed' after 2-minute auto-complete. Italian translations verified. Rate limiting may occur with rapid email sends (Resend API limit 2/sec).
